info.title: IntaSend Payments API
info.description: IntaSend Payments API for payment collection, sending money, wallets, payment links, subscriptions, M-Pesa Paybill, and FX rates.

post.description: Initiates an M-Pesa STK Push prompt to the customer's phone for payment collection.
Creates a new checkout session for collecting payments.
Retrieves details of an existing checkout session.
Checks the status of a payment transaction.
Generates a Co-operative Bank agent deposit payment reference for collection.
Generates a universal customer payment reference for collection across multiple channels.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of invoices.
Retrieves a single invoice by its ID.

post.description: Initiates a send money transaction. The transaction must be approved before funds are disbursed.
Approves a previously initiated send money transaction for processing.
Cancels a previously initiated send money transaction.
Validates recipient account details before initiating a send money transaction.

get.description: Retrieves a list of supported bank codes for send money transactions.
Retrieves a list of saved beneficiaries.
Retrieves a list of frequently used beneficiaries.
Retrieves a list of available transaction categories for send money.

post.description: Checks the status of a send money transaction.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of send money transactions.
Retrieves a single send money transaction by its ID.
Retrieves a list of all wallets.

post.description: Creates a new wallet.

get.description: Retrieves a single wallet by its ID.
Retrieves a paginated list of all transactions across wallets.
Retrieves a single transaction by its ID.
Retrieves a paginated list of transactions for a specific wallet.

post.description: Initiates a foreign exchange conversion between wallets.
Transfers funds between wallets within the same account.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of payment links.

post.description: Creates a new payment link.

get.description: Retrieves a single payment link by its ID.

post.description: Creates a new subscription plan.

get.description: Retrieves a list of subscription plans.

post.description: Creates a new customer for subscriptions.
Creates a new subscription for a customer on a plan.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of subscriptions.
Retrieves a single subscription by its ID.

post.description: Cancels an active subscription.

get.description: Retrieves transactions associated with a subscription.
Retrieves a list of M-Pesa Paybill accounts.

post.description: Registers a new M-Pesa Paybill account.

get.description: Retrieves a single M-Pesa Paybill account by its ID.
Retrieves a list of real-time foreign exchange rates.
Retrieves a specific FX rate by its ID.
Calculates the exchange conversion between two currencies at real-time rates.

parameters.name: from_currency
parameters.description: Source currency code (e.g. KES, USD, GBP)

parameters.name: to_currency
parameters.description: Target currency code (e.g. KES, USD, GBP)

BearerAuth.description: Bearer token authentication. Provide your secret API key as the bearer token.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-IntaSend-Public-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Public API key passed via request header.

BadRequest.description: Bad request - invalid parameters or missing required fields

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing authentication credentials

errors.description: Map of field names to error messages

next.description: URL for the next page of results

previous.description: URL for the previous page of results

phone_number.description: M-Pesa registered phone number in international format (e.g. 2547XXXXXXXX)

api_ref.description: Your unique reference for this transaction

wallet_id.description: Target wallet ID to receive funds

state.description: Current state of the STK Push

currency.description: Three-letter currency code (e.g. KES, USD, GBP)

api_ref.description: Your unique reference for this transaction

redirect_url.description: URL to redirect customer after payment

invoice_id.description: Invoice ID to check status for

checkout_id.description: Checkout ID to check status for

reference.description: Co-op Bank agent deposit reference number

customer_reference.description: Universal payment reference for the customer

account.description: Recipient account (phone number or bank account)

tracker_id.description: Tracker ID of the initiated transaction to approve
Tracker ID of the initiated transaction to cancel

account.description: Account number or phone number to validate

can_disburse.description: Whether the wallet can disburse funds

amount.description: Amount to exchange from source wallet

url.description: Public URL for the payment link

usage_limit.description: Maximum number of times the link can be used

amount.description: Fixed amount (omit or null for open-ended)

start_date.description: When the subscription starts (defaults to now)

tags.name: PaymentCollection
tags.description: Payment collection endpoints including M-Pesa STK Push, checkout, and invoices

tags.name: SendMoney
tags.description: Send money endpoints for initiating, approving, and managing transactions

tags.name: Wallets
tags.description: Wallet management, transactions, forex exchange, and internal transfers

tags.name: Subscriptions
tags.description: Subscription plans, customers, and subscription management

tags.name: FXRates
tags.description: Real-time foreign exchange rates and conversions
